why: The startup loop has no step that requires checking how every screen in the app actually looks when rendered — both in light and dark mode. Adding a screen-by-screen rendered audit to the loop means these problems get found automatically for every product, every time, before launch.

intended_outcome.statement: The startup loop includes a required rendered UI screen audit at S9B that covers every screen in both light and dark mode, with findings saved as an artifact and blocking issues preventing advance.
